steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At an intersection, the two expressions for $y$ are equal:
$$2x^2-17x+30=3x+a$$
$$2x^2-20x+30-a=0$$

steps.title: Use one-solution condition
steps.content:
Exactly one intersection means this quadratic in $x$ has one real solution, so its vertex gives the repeated solution. For $2x^2-20x+30-a$, the vertex $x$-value is
$$x=\frac{-(-20)}{2(2)}=5$$
The answer is C.
